prd.user_story: As a scientific computing engineer onboarding to the Python ML stack, I want to understand how data flows from raw array creation in numpy through pandas to scientific computation in scipy.
constraints: Trace at least 3 steps: array computation layer (numpy), data structure layer (pandas), and scientific computation layer (scipy).
For each step, cite the repo, file path, and function/class name.
prd.success_definition: Agent identifies: (1) numpy/numpy numpy/_core/fromnumeric.py mean function, (2) pandas-dev/pandas pandas/core/arrays/numpy_.py NumpyExtensionArray class, and (3) scipy/scipy scipy/stats/_stats_py.py pearsonr function.
prd.seed_prompt: Map the data flow from raw array creation through scientific computation across numpy, pandas, and scipy: trace numpy (array aggregation), pandas (array wrapping/integration), and scipy (statistical computation).

deepsearch_variant.variant_prompt: Use Deep Search to synthesize the data flow architecture across numpy, pandas, and scipy repositories.
deepsearch_variant.synthesis_focus: cross-library data flow tracing in scientific Python ecosystem
